3315010.name: Mitch
3315010.description:
In this story-driven art game, you’ll follow Mitch, who’s just moved to a strange new planet. Join her as she settles in — starting a new job, exploring the city, and meeting all kinds of interesting folk.

Key Features

  • Explore the city! Jump on the subway and discover each unique neighborhood.

  • Meet new friends! Develop relationships with a variety of unusual characters. 

  • Work for a spider chef! Grind away at your new job - serving sandwiches to flies.

  • Settle in for a heartwarming and introspective story. Watch Mitch as she grows and adapts to her new life. Face challenges, solve problems, and learn lessons as events unfold.

  • Enjoy open-world freedom grounded by a linear journey. Join Mitch for a week in her life. Each day is full of potential!

  • 100% indie. This is a two-dev project with hand-drawn artwork and an original soundtrack.
